name: YTLiteSkipSilence
description: Overcast-style Skip Silence for YouTube. Adds a clean YTVideoOverlay toggle button that dynamically speeds up silent regions of videos.

changelog.changes: Initial release. Overcast-style real-time silence detector via MTAudioProcessingTap. Clean YTVideoOverlay toggle button (top or bottom row). In-app settings section (ID 790) with threshold, speed, time-saved counter.
